name: To the castle of Montsonís - Circular from Pons & Artesa de Segre
name_original: Hasta el castillo de Montsonís - Circular desde Pons & Artesa de Segre
region_intro: Road cycling routes around Ponts are characterized by a diverse landscape featuring significant elevation changes, mountain passes, and scenic reservoirs. The region offers challenging climbs and descents, making it suitable for experienced road cyclists. Routes often traverse through areas with historical landmarks and natural water features. Best road cycling routes around Ponts The most popular road cycling route is Montsec and Coll de Comiols Loop from Pons, a 79.8 miles (128.4 km) trail that takes 6 hours 53 minutes to complete. This difficult route features significant elevation gain through mountain passes. Another top favourite among local road cyclists is To the castle of Montsonís - Circular from Pons & Artesa de Segre, a moderate 37.7 miles (60.6 km) path. This route leads to the historic Montsonís castle, offering a mix of cultural and scenic views. Local road cyclists also love the Roads of the Rialb Reservoir - Circular tour from Ponts, a 38.2 miles (61.6 km) trail leading through the Rialb Reservoir area, often completed in about 3 hours 30 minutes. Road cycling around Ponts is defined by mountain passes, reservoirs, and historical sites. The network offers options for different ability levels, with a focus on moderate to difficult routes. The routes in Ponts are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 5.0 stars from over 4 reviews. More than 400 road cyclists have used komoot to explore Ponts's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on road cycling routes around Ponts?
A: Road cycling routes around Ponts are characterized by a diverse landscape with significant elevation changes, including challenging climbs and descents through mountain passes. You'll also find scenic routes traversing areas with reservoirs and historical landmarks.

Q: How many road cycling routes are available in Ponts?
A: There are over 30 road cycling routes available around Ponts. These routes cater to various skill levels, with a focus on moderate to difficult options.

Q: Are there any easy road cycling routes for beginners in Ponts?
A: While Ponts is known for its challenging terrain, there are moderate routes available. For instance, the route &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e942504446/to-the-castle-of-montsonis-circular-from-pons-artesa-de-segre" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;To the castle of Montsonís - Circular from Pons & Artesa de Segre&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 37.7-mile (60.6 km) path that offers a mix of cultural and scenic views.

Q: What are some of the more challenging road cycling routes in Ponts?
A: For experienced road cyclists, Ponts offers several difficult routes. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e943045757/montsec-and-coll-de-comiols-loop-from-pons" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Montsec and Coll de Comiols Loop from Pons&lt;/a&gt; is a demanding 79.8-mile (128.4 km) trail with significant elevation gain. Another challenging option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/24552208" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Coll de Bóixols – Coll de Comiols loop from Ponts&lt;/a&gt;, spanning over 132 km with substantial climbing.

Q: What can I see along the road cycling routes in Ponts?
A: Many routes in Ponts integrate natural beauty with historical sites. You can cycle past the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5072101" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Montsonís Castle&lt;/a&gt;, explore the area around the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e945625694/roads-of-the-rialb-reservoir-circular-tour-from-ponts" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Rialb Reservoir&lt;/a&gt;, or discover the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5122254" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Abandoned Village of Claret&lt;/a&gt;. Other notable attractions include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2955079" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Hermitage of Sant Magí de Guardiola&lt;/a&gt; and the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/963846" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Padrí de Montsonís – Land Art Sculpture&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there any circular road cycling routes around Ponts?
A: Yes, Ponts offers several excellent circular routes. Popular options include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e942504446/to-the-castle-of-montsonis-circular-from-pons-artesa-de-segre" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;To the castle of Montsonís - Circular from Pons & Artesa de Segre&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e945625694/roads-of-the-rialb-reservoir-circular-tour-from-ponts" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Roads of the Rialb Reservoir - Circular tour from Ponts&lt;/a&gt;. For a longer challenge, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/20154645" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Clop Bridge – Solsona loop from Ponts&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What do other road cyclists say about the routes in Ponts?
A: The road cycling routes in Ponts are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 5.0 stars. Cyclists often praise the challenging mountain passes, scenic reservoirs, and the integration of historical sites along the routes.

Q: Are there any specific castles I can visit while road cycling near Ponts?
A: Absolutely. The region around Ponts is rich in historical castles. You can cycle to or past &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5072101" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Montsonís Castle&lt;/a&gt;, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/947499" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Montclar Castle&lt;/a&gt;, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5146016" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ribelles Castle&lt;/a&gt;, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5089887" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;La Clua&lt;/a&gt;, and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5072222" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Grialó Castle&lt;/a&gt;, among others.

Q: What is the typical duration for road cycling routes in Ponts?
A: The duration varies significantly based on the route's distance and difficulty. Moderate routes like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e942504446/to-the-castle-of-montsonis-circular-from-pons-artesa-de-segre" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;To the castle of Montsonís - Circular from Pons & Artesa de Segre&lt;/a&gt; can take around 3 hours, while more difficult and longer routes such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e943045757/montsec-and-coll-de-comiols-loop-from-pons" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Montsec and Coll de Comiols Loop from Pons&lt;/a&gt; can take nearly 7 hours to complete.

Q: Are there routes that combine natural features with historical sites?
A: Yes, many routes in Ponts offer this combination. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e942504446/to-the-castle-of-montsonis-circular-from-pons-artesa-de-segre" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;To the castle of Montsonís - Circular from Pons & Artesa de Segre&lt;/a&gt; leads to a historic castle while providing scenic views. Similarly, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e945625694/roads-of-the-rialb-reservoir-circular-tour-from-ponts" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Roads of the Rialb Reservoir - Circular tour from Ponts&lt;/a&gt; combines a significant natural water feature with the surrounding landscape.
tips: Montargull is a town in Artesa de Segre, in the region of La Noguera. The name comes from being built on a hill that marks the end of the Comiols mountain range and the beginning of a plan that is known by the same name as the town.

The porches of Plaça Major d'Artesa de Segre (Noguera) are a work included in the Inventory of the Architectural Heritage of Catalonia. Porchada within the medieval plot of the municipality of Artesa de Segre, which covers an entire facade of the square, formed by a series of arcades of various styles and heights, with semicircular and recessed arches.





https://ca.wikipedia.org/wiki/Porxos_pla%C3%A7a_Major_(Secret_Craft)
The guided tour with which you are going to enter the 12th century and take a trip through that time is recommended and interesting.
